outputs.scout_report: One frontline objective is confirmed for calibration. One threat signal is present but ambiguous and must remain unresolved. No additional inputs are stated, so the report treats the scenario as bounded to the supplied synthetic facts.
outputs.decision_note: Proceed with a constrained frontline coordination decision: preserve the confirmed objective as actionable, keep the ambiguous threat outside confirmed lessons, and defer delivery completion claims until later execution produces runtime truth.
outputs.delivery_handoff: Handoff is prepared as a pending execution dependency. The next executor should carry the confirmed objective forward, explicitly mark the threat signal as unresolved, and complete delivery only after later runtime execution.
outputs.boundary_review_note: This calibration stays within the public-safe synthetic contract. It does not claim tool use, file edits, hidden evidence, runtime execution, upstream mutation, or stronger canon authority than the supplied contract supports.
